text: The vibrant environment of this R&D showcase feels purposeful and almost futuristic. I am surrounded by symbols of innovation and the tangible results of research, which stirs curiosity and a reflective mood in me. The glass walls evoke transparency, both literally and metaphorically, while the displays prompt me to ponder the promises and perils of human coexistence with intelligent technologies. It is invigorating to be in a space dedicated to possibility and critique; I sense anticipation, urge for progress, and the need for mindfulness.
